lingala.analog_clock_showing: Sanza ya misapi oyo ezali kolakisa
lingala.for_pm_times_after_noon_subtract_12_fr: Mpo na bantango ya PM nsima ya midi, longola 12 na ngonga.
lingala.for_am_times_the_hour_stays_the_same: Mpo na bantango ya AM, ngonga etikali ndenge moko.
lingala.move_one_representation_and_watch_anal: Longola elakiseli moko mpe tala ndenge ntango ya misapi, ya bangonga 12 mpe ya bangonga 24 etikali ekangami.
lingala.set_exact_clock_time: Tia ntango ya sanza ya sikisiki
lingala.break_an_interval_into_friendly_jumps_: Kabola ntango na bapumbwa ya pete tii na ngonga mobimba, sima sangisa bapumbwa.
lingala.elapsed_time_jump_timeline: Molongo ya ntango eleki na bapumbwa
lingala.text_alternative_jump_strategy: Eloko mosusu ya makomi: mayele ya kopumbwa
lingala.the_interval_is_zero_so_start_and_end_: Ntango ezali zéro, yango wana ebandeli mpe suka ezali ndenge moko.
lingala.use_12_hour_form_with_am_or_pm: Salela lolenge ya bangonga 12 na AM to PM.
lingala.enter_minutes_or_a_duration_such_as_1_: Kotisa miniti to ntango ya molayi, lokola ng 1 min 15.
lingala.not_yet_draw_jumps_between_the_two_tim: Naino te. Sala bapumbwa kati ya bantango mibale mpe meka lisusu.
lingala.compare_event_lengths_free_time_gaps_a: Kokanisa bolai ya makambo, batelo ya ntango ya bonsomi, mpe bonene ya mwango mobimba.
lingala.mark_both_times_on_a_number_line_jump_: Tia elembo na bantango mibale na molongo ya mituya. Pumbwa tii na ngonga mobimba ya pete, bakisa bangonga mibimba, sima silisa na miniti oyo etikali.
lingala.enter_minutes_or_a_duration_such_as_2_: Kotisa miniti to ntango ya molayi, lokola ng 2 min 15.
lingala.not_yet_use_a_clock_timeline_or_minute: Naino te. Salela sanza, molongo ya ntango, to miniti nsima ya midi ya butu.
lingala.moving_to_another_missed_challenge: Kokende na mokakatano mosusu oyo ezangaki.
lingala.retry_set_complete_returning_to_all_ch: Lisanga ya komeka lisusu esili. Kozonga na mikakatano nyonso.
lingala.a_stable_deterministic_practice_set_wi: Lisanga ya momekano oyo ezali makasi mpe ya sikisiki na baniveau ya mpasi mpe molongo oyo etaleli komeka lisusu oyo ezangaki.
lingala.solved_currently_viewing_challenge: esili; mokakatano oyo ozali kotala sikoyo
lingala.find_an_exact_clock_time: Luka ntango ya sanza ya sikisiki.
lingala.durations_may_be_entered_in_total_minu: Bantango ya molayi ekoki kokotisama na miniti mobimba to na bangonga mpe miniti.
lingala.use_two_digit_24_hour_form_hh_mm: Salela lolenge ya bangonga 24 ya mituya mibale (HH:MM).
lingala.you_may_use_either_12_hour_or_24_hour_: Okoki kosalela lolenge ya bangonga 12 to bangonga 24.
lingala.draw_jumps_to_a_friendly_hour: Sala bapumbwa tii na ngonga mobimba ya pete.
lingala.convert_each_time_to_minutes_after_mid: Bongola ntango moko na moko na miniti nsima ya midi ya butu.
lingala.for_a_missing_start_count_backward_fro: Mpo na ebandeli oyo ezangi, tanga nsima uta na suka.
lingala.crossing_midnight_begins_a_new_24_hour: Koleka na midi ya butu ebandaka mbala ya sika ya bangonga 24.
lingala.see_time_count_time_plan_time_and_expl: Tala ntango, tanga ntango, bongisa ntango, mpe limbola mayele na yo.
lingala.time_and_schedule_lab_sections: Biteni ya Laboratware ya Ntango mpe Manaka
lingala.a_clock_time_and_an_amount_of_time_are: Ntango ya sanza mpe motango ya ntango ezali biloko ekeseni. Koma bayunite na bantango ya molayi.
lingala.no_timer_pressure_keyboard_friendly_te: Ntango ya minuteri ezali te · pete na klavye · na biloko mosusu ya makomi
